tasks.title: Feature 1: Robot Legend & Map Controls Panel
acceptance: Right-click on factory floor opens context menu with 'Legend & Settings' option
Advanced button in map title bar opens settings panel
Panel allows per-robot visibility toggle
Panel allows global trajectory toggle
Panel allows trail/history toggle
Panel shows status color legend (moving→blue, idle→gray, error→red, etc.)
Panel allows toggling robot labels, radar beacons, and glow rings
Panel allows toggling factory zone labels and grid lines
Settings persist in localStorage
Settings are applied immediately to canvas rendering

tasks.title: Feature 2: Full-Screen Map Mode
acceptance: Expand button in map header toggles full-screen mode
Full-screen mode hides all other panels
Mini HUD overlay shows time and active robot count
Escape key or close button exits full-screen mode
Canvas fills entire viewport

tasks.title: Feature 3: Historical Timeline Scrubber
acceptance: Timeline bar below map shows recent snapshots
User can scrub backward through history
Play/pause button with speed control (1x, 2x, 5x, 10x)
Replay animates robot movements in the map canvas

tasks.title: Feature 4: Customizable Dashboard Layout
acceptance: Settings menu allows choosing which panels to show
Panel visibility preferences saved to localStorage
Layout persists across page reloads

tasks.title: Feature 5: Energy & Efficiency Widget
acceptance: New widget showing simulated energy consumption per robot
Bar chart or gauge display
Updates in real-time with telemetry

tasks.title: Feature 6: Keyboard Shortcuts / Hotkeys
acceptance: F toggles full-screen map mode
1,2,3 selects respective robot
Escape closes popups and exits full-screen
R resets map view

tasks.title: Feature 7: Screenshot / Report Export
acceptance: Camera icon button captures dashboard as PNG
Map canvas is captured natively via toDataURL
Downloaded file includes timestamp in filename

tasks.title: Feature 8: Predictive Maintenance Dashboard
acceptance: New panel shows Remaining Useful Life (RUL) estimate per robot
RUL calculated from simulated wear factors (runtime, task intensity, error count)
Color-coded health bars (green→yellow→red)
Maintenance recommendations displayed for robots below threshold
Integration with AI agent for natural-language maintenance queries

tasks.title: Feature 9: 3D Factory Floor (Three.js)
acceptance: Toggle between 2D canvas and 3D Three.js view
3D scene shows factory floor with extruded walls and zones
Robots rendered as 3D cylinders/cones with orientation
Camera orbit controls (rotate/pan/zoom)
Smooth robot position interpolation matching 2D view
Robot selection by clicking 3D objects

tasks.title: Feature 10: Voice Command Interface
acceptance: Microphone button in header activates speech recognition
Commands: 'start robot C3', 'stop robot W2', 'fullscreen', 'reset map', 'show alerts'
Visual feedback while listening (pulsing mic icon)
Transcribed command shown as chat message
Fallback message if command not recognized
Works with Web Speech API (Chrome/Edge/Safari)

tasks.title: Feature 11: Activity Heatmap Overlay
acceptance: Toggle heatmap overlay on the factory floor map
Heatmap shows robot movement density (time spent per zone)
Gradient from cool (blue) to hot (red) based on activity
Heatmap data accumulates in real-time
Reset button to clear accumulated heatmap data

tasks.title: Feature 12: Production Line Visualization
acceptance: New panel shows animated product flow through assembly stations
Products (colored dots) move along conveyor lines between robots
Each product has a state (raw→assembled→welded→inspected→complete)
Throughput counter shows products per minute
Real-time animation synced with robot status

tasks.title: Feature 13: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
acceptance: Three roles: Admin, Operator, Viewer
Admin: full access (all panels, start/stop robots, settings)
Operator: can view and operate robots, cannot change system settings
Viewer: read-only dashboard, no robot controls
Role shown in header with color-coded badge
Login page includes role selection or backend-driven role assignment
Panel visibility and controls adapt based on role

tasks.title: Feature 14: OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) Widget
acceptance: New KPI card showing overall OEE percentage (Availability × Performance × Quality)
Breakdown bar showing the three OEE components
Per-robot OEE calculated from simulated telemetry
Industry-standard color coding (≥85% green, ≥70% amber, <70% red)
Trend arrow (up/down) compared to previous interval

tasks.title: Feature 15: Ambient Factory Audio Panel
acceptance: Web Audio API synthesised factory ambiance (hum, alerts, white noise)
Master volume slider and mute toggle
Audio reacts to robot states in real-time

tasks.title: Feature 16: Robot Telemetry Export (CSV/JSON)
acceptance: Download robot telemetry as CSV with timestamp filename
Download as structured JSON
Buttons integrated into Robot Fleet panel

tasks.title: Feature 17: AI Chat Telemetry Graph Generation
acceptance: AI responses with chart markers render as inline SVG charts
Supports bar and line chart types
Clean text fallback for non-chart responses

tasks.title: Feature 18: Factory Alert Sound + Browser Notifications
acceptance: Web Audio beep sequence on critical alerts
Browser Notification API integration
Notification enable/disable toggle with localStorage persistence

tasks.title: Feature 19: Robot Shift Scheduler
acceptance: Three-column shift view (Morning/Afternoon/Night)
Current shift highlighted with live detection
Per-robot shift assignment with task integration
localStorage persistence for assignments

tasks.title: Fix: Orphaned requirements.txt cleanup
acceptance: All services use uv + pyproject.toml in Docker
requirements.txt files removed from ai-agent, ai-service, ops-api

tasks.title: Fix: Keyboard shortcut robot selection (1-3 keys)
acceptance: Pressing 1/2/3 highlights corresponding robot on the map
Bright pulsing cyan selection ring rendered on canvas
DigialTwinMap reacts to select-robot custom event

tasks.title: Feature 20: Automated Test Suite (Vitest + Playwright)
acceptance: Vitest unit tests for utility functions and hooks
Component smoke tests for all major panels
Playwright e2e test for login→dashboard flow
Test script added to package.json
Tests pass in CI environment

tasks.title: Feature 21: Dark/Light Theme Toggle
acceptance: Theme toggle button in header
Light theme variant of all CSS (inverted from dark)
Theme preference persisted in localStorage
Smooth CSS transition on theme switch
All components respect theme CSS variables

tasks.title: Feature 22: Multi-Language i18n (English + French)
acceptance: Language toggle in header (EN/FR)
All UI strings externalized to translation JSON files
Language preference persisted in localStorage
French translations for all panels, controls, and statuses
Moment/locale-style date formatting per language

tasks.title: Feature 23: CI/CD Pipeline (GitHub Actions)
acceptance: GitHub Actions workflow for frontend build + test
GitHub Actions workflow for backend (ops-api) build + test
Docker compose build validation step
Lint and type-check gates
Badge in README for build status

tasks.title: Feature 24: Mobile Adaptive Layout
acceptance: Responsive layout collapses to single-column on mobile
Touch-friendly controls (larger buttons, swipe gestures)
Bottom navigation bar on mobile instead of header
Map canvas adapts to small screen aspect ratio
Tested at 375px, 768px, and 1024px widths

tasks.title: Feature 25: Kiosk Mode / Factory Floor Video Wall
acceptance: Dedicated kiosk URL parameter (?kiosk=true)
Full-screen auto-launch, no login required
Large-font mode for readability at distance
Auto-rotating panel focus (cycle through key panels)
Hides all header controls, shows only essential data

tasks.title: Feature 26: Time-Machine Mode (Historical Comparison)
acceptance: Date/time picker to load historical telemetry snapshot
Side-by-side comparison view (now vs. selected time)
Diff indicators on KPI gauges (delta from historical)
Historical timeline scrubber extended with date range selection
Animated transition between current and historical state

tasks.title: Feature 27: Backend API Rate Limiting & Security
acceptance: Rate limiting middleware on ops-api (100 req/min per IP)
CORS hardening with explicit allowed origins
Security headers (Helmet-style: X-Content-Type-Options, CSP, HSTS)
Input validation on all POST endpoints
API key authentication option alongside JWT

tasks.title: Feature 28: Audit Logging Service
acceptance: Structured audit log for all robot operations (start, stop, task, e-stop)
Audit log stored in PostgreSQL with auto-cleanup (30-day retention)
Audit log viewer panel in frontend (new panel)
Filterable by robot, action type, date range, and user role
CSV export of audit logs

tasks.title: Feature 29: Webhook Integration System
acceptance: Webhook configuration API (CRUD endpoints for webhooks)
Webhook triggers: on_alert_critical, on_robot_error, on_robot_start, on_robot_stop
HTTP POST to configured URLs with JSON payload
Retry with exponential backoff (3 attempts)
Webhook management UI in frontend

tasks.title: Feature 30: Real-time Telemetry Streaming Analytics
acceptance: Rolling 1-hour window analytics on telemetry stream
Calculated metrics: avg/max/min uptime, alert rate, robot utilization
Redis-backed time-series buffer (not persistent storage)
New analytics WebSocket channel with 5-second update interval
Analytics dashboard widget showing trend lines

tasks.title: Feature 31: Service Health Monitoring Dashboard
acceptance: Health check aggregation across all services (core, ai, api, agent, redis, db)
Service status indicator (up/down/degraded) with latency
Uptime tracking since last restart
New frontend panel showing service health grid
Auto-refresh every 10 seconds

tasks.title: Feature 32: PDF Report Generation
acceptance: Backend endpoint generates PDF report of current factory state
Report includes: KPI summary, per-robot status, alert log, OEE
Frontend download button in header
Report filename includes timestamp
Uses weasyprint or reportlab (server-side rendering)

tasks.title: Feature 33: Docker Compose Production Profile
acceptance: Production docker-compose profile with resource limits
Healthcheck improvements on all services
Readiness and liveness probes
Volume mounts for persistent data (PostgreSQL, Redis)
Reverse proxy (Caddy/Nginx) for unified ingress
Environment-specific override files (dev/prod profiles)

tasks.title: Feature 34: Prometheus Metrics Endpoint
acceptance: /metrics endpoint exposing http_requests_total, robots_active_total, alerts_critical_total, uptime_seconds
Prometheus text/plain format with HELP/TYPE annotations

tasks.title: Feature 35: Grafana + Prometheus Monitoring Config
acceptance: Grafana dashboard JSON with 4 panels (uptime, alert rate, robot count, OEE)
Prometheus scrape config targeting ops-api:8003

tasks.title: Feature 36: Terraform Infrastructure-as-Code
acceptance: Docker provider Terraform config for all 8 containers
Variables and outputs for environment customization

tasks.title: Feature 38: Performance Benchmark Scripts
acceptance: API benchmark script (httpx, concurrency, latency percentiles)
WebSocket benchmark script (message rate measurement)

tasks.title: Feature 39: Developer Onboarding CLI
acceptance: PowerShell setup script (Windows)
Bash setup script (Linux/Mac)

tasks.title: Feature 40: Security Scanning Configuration
acceptance: .snyk policy file
.trivyignore exclusions file
Weekly security scan GitHub Action

tasks.title: Feature 41: Edge Device Simulator (IoT Sensor Grid)

Sensor dashboard widget showing live readings with sparklines
Configurable failure modes (drift, spike, dropout) for testing
REST API to query current sensor values

tasks.title: Feature 42: Robot Fleet Auto-Discovery
acceptance: New robots register via HTTP POST to /api/v1/robots/register
Auto-assigned robot IDs with configurable prefix
Fleet panel shows registration status and last heartbeat
Heartbeat timeout marks robots as offline (30s threshold)
Fleet auto-refresh with new robot animations

tasks.title: Feature 43: gRPC Service Definitions

gRPC server implementation for ops-api alongside HTTP
Python generated stubs for ai-service and ai-agent
Docker multi-stage build with protoc codegen
End-to-end test demonstrating gRPC telemetry streaming

tasks.title: Feature 44: Digital Twin State Reconciliation
acceptance: State version vector for conflict detection
Digital twin state diff visualization in frontend
Reconciliation endpoint merging conflicting states
Timestamp-based conflict resolution strategy
State history tree with branching visualization

tasks.title: Feature 45: OpenTelemetry Distributed Tracing

Trace context propagation across HTTP calls
Span attributes for robot operations and telemetry processing
Jaeger-compatible export via OTLP

tasks.title: Feature 46: Kubernetes Helm Chart

Ingress template with TLS support
ConfigMap and Secret templates
Helm chart linting workflow in CI

tasks.title: Feature 47: Multi-Factory / Site Management
acceptance: Site entity with name, location, timezone, robot fleet
Site switcher in dashboard header (dropdown)
Per-site telemetry isolation (different Redis channels)
Multi-site aggregate dashboard view
Site configuration API (CRUD)

tasks.title: Feature 48: Federated Learning Control Panel
acceptance: New panel showing simulated federated learning rounds across edge devices
Each edge node (10 IoT sensors) runs a local training round
Global model aggregation with FedAvg visualized as a tree
Accuracy/loss chart per round
Start/stop training controls with configurable rounds

tasks.title: Feature 49: Predictive Quality Control
acceptance: Predict product defect probability from real-time sensor readings
Per-station quality score with color-coded indicators
Defect trend chart over time (last 100 products)
Red highlight on stations with >15% predicted defect rate
Integration with ai-agent for root-cause analysis queries

tasks.title: Feature 50: Supply Chain Visibility Dashboard
acceptance: Simulated inventory levels for 6 part types (widgets, boards, cables, etc.)
Animated supply chain flow from supplier → warehouse → line
Reorder alerts when inventory drops below threshold
Lead time display per part type
Stock-out risk indicator (green/amber/red)

tasks.title: Feature 51: Worker Safety Zone Monitor
acceptance: Simulated worker positions on factory floor map
Safety zone boundaries rendered as semi-transparent overlays
Alert when worker enters restricted robot zone (proximity < 2m)
Worker count per zone displayed in sidebar
Incident log with timestamps for safety violations

tasks.title: Feature 52: Energy Optimization AI Advisor
acceptance: AI-driven energy optimization suggestions based on sensor data
What-if analysis: 'reduce line speed by 10% → save 15% energy'
Energy cost projection chart (current vs optimized)

Integration with ai-agent for natural-language energy queries

tasks.title: Feature 53: Advanced Digital Twin Simulator

Side-by-side comparison of baseline vs simulated scenario

tasks.title: Feature 54: Real-time Collaboration Annotations
acceptance: Users can place annotations on the factory floor map
Annotation types: note, alert pin, measurement line, area highlight

Author name and timestamp shown on each annotation
Annotation filter by type
Right-click context menu 'Add Annotation' opens creation modal

Each annotation type rendered uniquely on canvas (note box, alert pin, measure line, area highlight)

tasks.title: PT-1: Fix Legend & Settings panel (robot on/off toggles)
acceptance: Robot visibility toggles in Map Settings Panel actually hide/show robots on canvas

All overlay toggles (trajectories, trails, labels, beacons, glow, zone labels, grid, heatmap) work immediately

tasks.title: PT-2: Fix robot context menu (Start/Stop by status, dismiss)
acceptance: Right-click near a robot shows robot name, status, and action button
Shows 'Start Robot' only when robot is idle/stopped/offline
Shows 'Stop Robot' only when robot is moving/active
Clicking outside context menu dismisses it

tasks.title: PT-3: Fix Command Console (status-based buttons, feedback)
acceptance: Resume button only enabled if robot is paused/stopped
Pause button only enabled if robot is moving/active
Each action shows feedback text (e.g. 'Task Assembly Line A assigned to C3')

tasks.title: PT-4: Camera tab per-view robot selection

tasks.title: PT-5: AI Chat UX improvements

Message timestamp display
Chat history export or copy button

tasks.title: PT-6: Dashboard margin/spacing and font size

tasks.title: PT-7: Mock audit — identify mocked vs real implementations

tasks.title: Fix Snyk SARIF output in security-scan.yml
acceptance: Snyk Dependency Scan job passes (SARIF file generated and uploaded)
Security Scan workflow is fully green

tasks.title: Upgrade deprecated GitHub Actions across all workflows
acceptance: actions/checkout@v4 → @v6.0.2 in all 3 workflow files (Node.js 20 deprecation)
actions/setup-node@v4 → @v6.4.0 in ci.yml (Node.js 20 deprecation)
github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v3 → @v4 in security-scan.yml (deprecated Dec 2026)

tasks.title: BUG: Legend & Settings panel — buttons/controls not working in factory
acceptance: Settings button in factory map header opens Legend & Settings panel
All toggles in the panel (robot visibility, overlays, colors) actually change the canvas rendering
Start/Stop buttons in popup/context menu have immediate visual effect
Popup/context menu dismisses on Cancel, click outside, or Escape
Context menu 'Legend & Settings' option opens the settings panel
No console errors when interacting with panel controls
tasks.fix: Added `settings` to the dependency array of the main render loop useEffect in DigitalTwinMap.tsx (line 1076). The effect had `[sx, sy]` but used `settings` extensively inside; without it in deps, the canvas never refreshed with new settings from the panel.
